settings.text:
White Sparrow Farmacy is a family-run skincare brand based on the Mason farm in Idaho. We make 100% grass-fed tallow balms, lip balms, and body care products in small batches -- with no synthetic additives, no fillers, and no ingredient lists that require a chemistry degree to decode.

Everything we sell, we make ourselves. Every batch is traceable to our own cattle. That's not a marketing claim -- it's just how we've always done it.

If you're new here, the tallow balm is where most people start.

settings.title: Ready to try it?
settings.text: Everything we make starts on the farm and ends up on your skin. No shortcuts, no mystery ingredients, no middlemen.
